1783550.name: UEBERNATURAL Soundtrack
1783550.description:
ORIGINAL UEBERNATURAL SOUNDTRACK
Get an UEBERFANTASTIC Classic Rock soundtrack composed especially for UEBERNATURAL.
Classic rock was my first love. It changed me and made me a better person. But most of all, it ignited my love for music.

The Vinyl and Cassette covers are fictional.... UEBERinvented so to speak!
But this is how both covers would look in the real world. In analog :)
Of course you will get all the covers and artwork with this DLC!


This OST includes 5 songs:
